title: xanthophytum fruticulosum
intro: Xanthophytum fruticulosum, also known as the Java tea tree, is a plant species in the family Clusiaceae, native to tropical regions of Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Xanthophytum fruticulosum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of depression. In traditional medicine, it is often prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water, or used in combination with other herbs in a tincture or capsule form.
